content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_patients', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_patients;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_patients
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.patients;

    INSERT INTO silver.patients
    (
        patient_id,
        patient_name,
        gender
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(patient_id AS INT)            AS patient_id,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(patient_name)), '') AS patient_name,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(gender)), '')       AS gender
    FROM bronze.patients;
END;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_visits', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_visits;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_visits
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.visits;

    INSERT INTO silver.visits
    (
        visit_id,
        patient_id,
        visit_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(visit_id AS INT)    AS visit_id,
        TRY_CAST(patient_id AS INT)  AS patient_id,
        TRY_CAST(visit_date AS DATE) AS visit_date
    FROM bronze.visits;
END;
GO
